title: MCP .well-known discovery document
description: Domain-level self-declared discovery metadata for Model Context Protocol servers, published at https://<domain>/.well-known/mcp.json. This is a community reference proposal; it will track the official specification as capability discovery is standardized.

$schema.description: Optional URI of the JSON Schema this document conforms to.

name.description: Human-readable name of the publisher (organization or product).

description.description: Short description of what the published MCP servers offer.

version.description: Version of this discovery document (semantic versioning, e.g. 1.2.0).

spec_version.description: Model Context Protocol specification revision the servers target, as a date-based revision (e.g. 2025-06-18).

servers.description: MCP servers exposed by this domain.

contact.description: Contact for the publisher: a mailto: URI or an https:// URL.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update to this document (e.g. 2026-07-01T12:00:00Z).

name.description: Identifier for this server, unique within the document.

endpoint.description: HTTPS URL of the MCP endpoint.

transport.description: Transport protocol offered at the endpoint.

docs.description: URL of human-readable documentation for this server.

authentication.description: How clients authenticate against the endpoint.

scopes.description: OAuth 2.0 scopes the client should request.

authorization_server.description: OAuth 2.0 authorization server issuer URL (for type: oauth2).

capabilities.description: Advertised server-side MCP capabilities (client-side capabilities such as sampling are not declared here). Each entry is either a boolean or a list of feature names (e.g. tool names).
